General.Name: Teekay Tankers Ltd
General.Description: Teekay Tankers Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides marine transportation services to oil industries in Bermuda and internationally. The company operates in two segments: Tankers and Marine Servies. It offers voyage and time charter services; offshore ship-to-ship transfer of commodities primarily crude oil and refined oil products; and tanker commercial and technical management services. In addition, the company is involved in the vessels management, procurement, and equipment rental businesses. It serves energy and utility companies, oil traders, oil consumers and petroleum product producers, government agencies, and various other entities that depend upon marine transportation. The company was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Hamilton, Bermuda.
